reviews.review_description:
As an Ex DJ and VJ... I review tranzient with fondness and some nostalgia. Nostalgia because I never thought, back in the day, I'd be 'spinning wheels of steel' in thin air with my hands.
But this is so much more - full modular synthesis is hidden in there and then there's the visuals...
Wow. Don't over think it... Buy it and be prepared to get lost as hour after hour goes by, while you create and craft unique sounds and full songs.

developer_response.body: Hi cly3d, thanks for your kind words, great to hear you enjoy Tranzient!

reviews.review_description: For the price. This app is awesome.i really like it

developer_response.body: Hi pem454, thanks for the good review :)
